model_stance_conclusion_text: I **disagree** with the legalization of sex selection.

nodes.node_text: Supporters argue that individuals should have the right to make decisions about their own reproductive choices, including selecting the sex of their child.

argument_list.matched_argument: every parent should have the choice to what sex they want for their kids.
families should have the right to choose the sex of their babies.
parents have every right to decide whether they give birth to a boy or a girl.
parents have the right to decide what gender child they want.
parents have the right to select the sex of their child
parents should be able to choose what sex child they are going to have.
parents should be able to chose the sex of their children.
parents should have the right to decide what gender of child they want.
parents should have the right to select the gender of their kids
people should have the right to choose the sex of their child
sex selection is the choice of the parents
sex selection should be a choice for parents to make and therefore should be legalized.
sex selection should be a parent's choice.
sex selection should be a right of parents to choose what child they want to bear
we should legalize sex  selection because people should be able to make their own choices
we should legalize sex selection as everyone should have the right to determine the sex of their children.
we should legalize sex selection because it is the decision of the parents if they want to select the sex of the baby and no one else.
we should legalize sex selection because parents have rights when it comes to their own children.
we should legalize sex selection because the parents are free to decide what gender they want

nodes.node_text: This aligns with principles of personal freedom and bodily autonomy.

argument_list.matched_argument: everyone has the right to be who they want to be and the government has no right to prevent that.
it's a personal decision that should not be regulated
legalizing sex selection is the right thing for personal freedom of choice.
maximizing reproductive freedom includes sex selection.
People's freedoms should be maximized as long as no one is harmed. Therefore, a couple should have the freedom to choose the sex of its child.
sex selection enhances people's right to choose and should be legalized.
sex selection is simply a matter of choice and bodily autonomy;  every woman should be allowed to decide this on her own
the right to bodily autonomy permits mothers to have abortions for sex selective purposes
we should legalize sex selection because it should be up to people to make that choice. freedom of choice is vital in democracies and should be protected where possible.
we should legalize sex selection to support autonomy
women have the right to control their bodies,

nodes.node_text: Some families may desire a child of a specific sex to "balance" their family composition (e.g., having both a son and a daughter).

argument_list.matched_argument: Gender selection helps families balance the number of boys and girls in their family.
if a family has a child or multiple children of the same sex, sex selection allows for the family to insure they have a child of the opposite sex.
people have the right to balance their families by choosing the sex of their children.
people should be able to select the sex of the children so that they can balance their family the way they wish it to be.
sex section could be useful in balancing the genders of a larger family, and surely parents can be afforded some degree of control?
sex selection allows families to be balanced.
sex selection balances the number of children born of each sex
sex selection can be used to help balance out families so that there aren't several kids of one gender.
sex selection can be useful for a family to balance out their's; say a family has three boys, and wants a girl.
sex selection is a choice between parents and their doctor; if the parents insist on having a boy to, say, balance out a family full of girls, then what's the problem with that?

sex selection is the perfect solution to a family that has a history of all one gender.  many families want the perfect one and one so it's perfect for those as well.  it's a win no matter how you look.
sex selection should be legalized as it should be the parents choice a couple may have three boys and want a girl
we should legalize sex selection. if i want to have a baby girl, who has the right to deny me my wish? what if i had two boys already and don't want a third?

nodes.node_text: Legalizing sex selection could help fulfill this desire.

argument_list.matched_argument: sex selection would fulfill the dreams of many parents.
sex selections gives a family the children that they wish for

nodes.node_text: In some cases, sex selection could reduce societal pressure on families to have children of a specific gender, particularly in cultures with strong son preference.

argument_list.matched_argument: sex selection should be allowed so that families can have children of the gender they desire without overpopulating in an attempt to gain the desires sex. selection would reduce births of an unwanted sex.
sex selection should be permitted in countries where children are only permitted to have one child, otherwise if children of the undesired sex are born they may end up in an orphanage.
We should legalize sex selection because in regions where infanticide is practiced, this would make it unnecessary.

nodes.node_text: By allowing sex selection, families might feel less compelled to have multiple children in pursuit of a desired gender.

argument_list.matched_argument: as it does away with people continuously having children so that they can get the gender they want.
by allowing parents to choose the sex of their baby, they can have exactly the amount of children they want, instead of possibly having multiple babies before getting the sex they wanted.
it will eliminate the need to keep trying to until you get the gender you want.
sex selection could help with overpopulation as parents wouldn't have to keep having kids until they get the gender they wanted

sex selection should be allowed so that families can have children of the gender they desire without overpopulating in an attempt to gain the desires sex. selection would reduce births of an unwanted sex.
we should legalize sex selection because it can give the family control over their family size

nodes.node_text: Sex selection technologies, such as preimplantation genetic diagnosis (PGD), are already available and used in some countries.

argument_list.matched_argument: medical science allowed the people to have the choice of sex selection and should be legalized.

nodes.node_text: Legalizing it could ensure regulated and safe access to these technologies.

argument_list.matched_argument: legalizing sex selection would make it safer, doctors and parents could do it in the open as opposed to hiding it, which would lead to better patient outcomes
sex selection is a safe tool to help parents attain the family they dream of, thus should be legalized
We should legalize sex selection because a ban leads to dangerous back alley procedures, and to more abortions and female infanticide
We should legalize sex selection because if it is banned, families will turn to more dangerous black market abortion providers, and more women will die.

nodes.node_text: Legalizing sex selection could exacerbate gender imbalances, particularly in societies with a strong preference for one gender (e.g., sons).

argument_list.matched_argument: allowing sex selection could lead to an imbalance of the genders in the population.
allowing sex selection may lead to a gender imbalance in the population causing problems for future generations.
countries that used sex selection, like china, now have a problem with two many older men and not enough women to marry them and have more children for the next generation.
if all families decide to only select one sex then there will be an imbalance between the sexes
if we gave people the right to choose the sex we will have very few females in our world.   they most likely would choose a boy.   let god be the creator of the child and we should never intervene.
In societies where sex selection happens, men are favored over women, resulting in a lopsided sex ratio. This leads to many men being unable to wed.
it can lead to a gender imbalance in society
it may lead to male or female overpopulation
legalised sex selection will cause a damaging shift in the usual 50:50 demographic split between men and women

legalising sex selection will gradually create harmful gender imbalances - harmful in the short term due to negative value stereotypes that could be attribute to a particular sex, and long term to birth rates.
legalising sex selection would cause an imbalance in the male to female ratio in the population leading to serious social problems
legalizing sex selection will lead to an undesirable imbalance in the ratio of males to females
legalizing sex selection will tip the population genders out of balance
legalizing sex selection would be too costly, causing a surplus of one gender in just a couple decades time.
more people will select boys and their will be a shortage of women for them when they reach adulthood
not enough girls will be selected by sexist cultures which will result in social strain in future years.
selecting sex might throw off the balance between male and female. many cultures value males over females
selecting the sex of babies could lead to an in balance in society demonstrated by china , where the one child policy resulted in  areas where there are  approximately  10 males to 1 female.
sex selection allows people to play god and can create an imbalance between sexes in the population as a whole
sex selection can cause an over abundance of one sex over the other.
sex selection can lead to a gender imbalance if one sex is favoured over the other. this can lead to a lack of suitable partners in the future and people being forced to lead a single life.
sex selection can lead to a serious gender imbalance
sex selection can lead to an over abundance of a favored gender in society
Sex selection can lead to gender imbalance by distorting the natural male-female sex ratio.
sex selection can lead to societies where there are more men than women. this can mean that a lot of men cannot find a wife and are unhappy.
sex selection could cause more of one sex thus creating an imbalance.
sex selection could create places where boys outnumber girls by  a lot since there are many places that value boys more than girls, and this could create problems as they get older
sex selection could create significant gender imbalances in society, reinforcing various stereotypes and potentially even impacting birth rates - we should not be playing god.
sex selection could lead to an imbalance of genders
sex selection could lead to gender inbalance in some societies.

sex selection is a slippery slope.  we could end up with a drastic imbalance of men and women, especially in some cultures that place more value on one over the other.  this could lead to future danger.
sex selection is discriminatory to females on average and is leading to a shortage of women worldwide.
sex selection is playing god, will create gender imbalances and create negative stereotypes concerning male/female preferences.
sex selection is unnatural and will have long term negative consequences on society. we will become overpopulated with male children and females will become targets of sexual crimes.
sex selection leads to a gender imbalance in the next generation
sex selection leads to further harms against women. many families would choose to only have boys. the population would end up highly uneven and thrown into chaos.
sex selection leads to imbalanced populations that are unsustainable which could lead to the downfall of all humanity
sex selection may cause an imbalance in genders in the general population.
sex selection might cause an excess of one sex to be born at a specific time
sex selection promotes gender discrimination and can lead to gender imbalances in society
sex selection will have devastating consequences for gender imbalance.
sex selection will have troublesome effects on gender disparity.
sex selection will lead to a gender imbalance in the population, for example in countries like china where families would prefer to have boys rather than girls.
sex selection will leave some countries with more males than females because certain countries value males more than females
sex selection would obviously lead to an imbalance and discrimination of one sex, especially in societies that have traditionally viewed women as inferior or unwanted as children.
sex selection would result in an unbalance of gender across the globe, this could mean that some countries would have too few females to maintain a stable population and fights could break out.

The third world already suffers from an imbalanced birth rate with more men than woman born. Making it legally possible will worsen the problems we see today- difficulty to find a wife, restlessness and violence.
there will be an imbalance if one sex is continuously chosen over another
this could cause imbalance in population, if a generation is selected as mainly male or female
we should not do this because other countries like china already did and it caused an epidemic where there is a huge imbalance of males to females which disrupts the population
we should not legalise sex selection because in countries where everyone wants a male child, can cause massive problems to the country.
we should not legalize sex selection as this is enabling people to play god and may lead to the destabilisation of future generations e.g. more males than females

we should not legalize sex selection because it might cause an unbalanced society.

we shouldn't legalize sex selection because it is immoral. only god can decide what the sex of the baby will be. if this were legalized, there would be more males than females and that is discrimination.

nodes.node_text: Sex selection raises ethical questions about valuing one gender over another and could reinforce harmful gender stereotypes.

argument_list.matched_argument: legalising sex selection will gradually create harmful gender imbalances - harmful in the short term due to negative value stereotypes that could be attribute to a particular sex, and long term to birth rates.
sex selection could create significant gender imbalances in society, reinforcing various stereotypes and potentially even impacting birth rates - we should not be playing god.
sex selection encourages  gender discrimination, which is illegal
sex selection is playing god, will create gender imbalances and create negative stereotypes concerning male/female preferences.
sex selection may lead to discrimination and further sexism in society, especially in areas where female babies are already looked on as lesser.
sex selection promotes gender discrimination and can lead to gender imbalances in society
Sex selection reinforces a culture of male-dominated sexism and devalues women.

we should not allow such an immoral thing that will more than likely fuel the inequality of genders by promoting men as more valuable

nodes.node_text: It may also lead to the commodification of children, treating them as products rather than individuals.

argument_list.matched_argument: a parent is suppose to love a child no matter they are male or female, the natural way of determination, and sex selection makes children commodities instead of miracles.
legalizing sex selection opens the door for other forms of discrimination.  first sex, then skin tone, hair color, eye color, babies should not be designed.
Parents may have unusually high expectations of their "designer baby" which may not be met.

nodes.node_text: Legalizing sex selection could pave the way for other forms of genetic selection, such as selecting for traits like intelligence, appearance, or physical abilities.

argument_list.matched_argument: legalizing sex selection is a slippery slope that could lead to other selections, like hair color, height, or something more drastic.
legalizing sex selection opens the door for other forms of discrimination.  first sex, then skin tone, hair color, eye color, babies should not be designed.
sex selection is a slippery slope that may lead to parents picking other traits to screen for, from innocent ones like hair color, to larger ones like iq.
sex selection will invariably lead down a slippery slope of screening for other genetic factors: hair color, handedness, etc. where will it stop?
We should not legalize sex selection as this is playing god and can open the door to a raft of other genetic selection that is not thoroughly tested.

nodes.node_text: This raises concerns about eugenics and societal discrimination based on genetic characteristics.

sex selection will invariably lead down a slippery slope of screening for other genetic factors: hair color, handedness, etc. where will it stop?
